testing_centers.notes: Available at Certiport Authorized Testing Centers (primarily academic)

id_requirements: One valid, government-issued photo ID. Name on ID must match registration. For online: webcam required, room must be clear of people and materials.
exam_rules: No notes, books, or study materials. No phones or smartwatches. Whiteboard or scratch paper may be provided by testing center. Online: no dual monitors, no virtual machines, no headphones, must be alone in a closed room.
renewal_options: Microsoft certifications (Associate/Expert/Specialty) are renewed annually for free via a short renewal assessment on Microsoft Learn. Renewal assessment available 6 months before expiry. Fundamentals certifications do not expire.
target_audience: Microsoft Dynamics 365 functional consultant with sales expertise
recommended_experience: Strong business knowledge of sales processes for business-to-customer and business-to-business scenarios. Proficient in configuring Microsoft Power Platform, primarily model-driven apps. Knowledge of Microsoft 365 services and their interactions with Microsoft Dataverse.

retake_policy.notes: No waiting period for first retake if score >= 500 on failed attempt. If score < 500: 14-day waiting period before retake. Maximum 5 attempts per exam per year (365 days). Free retake voucher sometimes included in official instructor-led training.

objectives.title: Configure user interfaces
sub_objectives: Create email, Excel, and Word templates
Configure column mappings on table relationships
Configure sales territories and hierarchical sales territories
Configure auto number settings for quotes, orders, and invoices
Configure the business card scanner control
Import data by using the Data Import wizard and export data to Excel
Implement Power BI apps for Sales
Configure and utilize the Sales accelerator
Configure lead and opportunity assignment rules for routing
Compare and contrast Sales Professional and Enterprise configuration
Describe use cases for Team member licensing
Describe the upgrade pathway from Sales Professional to Enterprise

objectives.title: Create and manage accounts and contacts
sub_objectives: Describe use cases for auto capture
Describe use cases for email engagement
Describe use cases for notes analysis
Describe SMS message engagement with customers

objectives.title: Create and manage leads and opportunities
sub_objectives: Track stakeholders, sales team members, and competitors
Manage product line items on opportunities
Configure and utilize predictive lead and opportunity scoring
Manage the sales pipeline by using the work list

objectives.title: Create and manage quotes, orders, and invoices
sub_objectives: Send quotes and invoices to customers

objectives.title: Create and manage the product catalog
sub_objectives: Create and manage products, product bundles, and product families

objectives.title: Integrate sales applications
sub_objectives: Integrate with LinkedIn Sales Navigator and Insights
Describe Dynamics 365 Sales mobile app capabilities
Create push notifications for the Dynamics 365 Sales mobile app
Deploy the Dynamics 365 App for Outlook
Configure the Dynamics 365 App for Outlook
Configure auto capture and email engagement
Describe Microsoft Teams calling and conversation intelligence
